title: Nylon Universal Cable Tie Buckle, Heavy Duty Self, Locking Zip Ties with Pin & Button, New Multifunctional Cable Tie Buckle, UV Resistant Black Zipties for Car Daily Auto Fixing (50 Pcs)
features: 【Versatile Solution】Nylon Universal Cable Tie Buckle is the perfect choice for securing fenders, trunk linings, engine covers, and underbody panels, effectively replacing over 90% of screws and clips found in most vehicles. It's an essential tool for everyday automotive maintenance.
【Quick-Install Pin & Button Design】Features a convenient self-locking system with a pin-and-button mechanism—no tools required. Perfect as bumper retainer clips or for DIY fixes in your garage.
【DURABLE UV RESISTANT BLACK ZIPTIES】Made of high-strength nylon, these plastic cable ties are UV resistant and built to withstand rain, heat, and wear; designed for long-term use indoors or outdoors.
【Compact & Easy to Carry】Small and lightweight, these zip ties are easy to store in your glove box or toolbox. Reliable for on-the-go fixes or last-minute fastening tasks.

【Multi-scenario Application】Cable Tie Buckle can be widely used for a variety of bundling and fixing tasks such as vehicle wiring organization, home wire storage, equipment repair, daily DIY, etc. It is a practical tool for car owners, repairers and home users.
description: Nylon Universal Cable Tie Buckle, Heavy Duty Self, Locking Zip Ties with Pin & Button, New Multifunctional Cable Tie Buckle, UV Resistant Black Zipties for Car Daily Auto Fixing Product Specification： Name: Nylon Universal Cable Tie Buckle Material: Plastic, Reusable Size: As Shown Package Include: Nylon Universal Cable Tie Buckle 50PCS Nylon Universal Cable Tie Buckle 100PCS Nylon Universal Cable Tie Buckle 200PCS Note Tips: 1.Please allow 0~1 inch error due to manual measurement.
